description_long: This is a semi-circular corner cabinet designed to fit snugly against a wall, with a flat back and a curved front. The exterior is adorned with raised or embossed characters, possibly from the Cyrillic alphabet, giving it a decorative and thematic appearance. The cabinet stands on three short legs, providing stability and a slight elevation from the ground. The front face appears to be a single door panel, likely hinged, with no visible handles, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism. The surface is smooth and finished in a uniform light color, likely painted or coated wood. Its compact size and unique design make it suitable for urban interiors such as lobbies, hallways, or public waiting areas.
description: A semi-circular corner cabinet with embossed characters on its smooth, light-colored surface and a single front door panel. It stands on three short legs and is designed for decorative and functional use in urban interiors.
description_view_0: The cabinet is seen from the front corner, highlighting the curved face and embossed characters, with the three legs visible.
description_view_1: This angled side view shows the flat back and the continuation of the decorative characters along the curved front panel.
description_view_2: A direct front view reveals the full extent of the embossed characters and the single door panel, with the legs symmetrically positioned.
description_view_3: The opposite angled side view displays the flat back and the curved front, with the decorative characters wrapping around the visible surfaces.
